summary: Staff Zone Lookup Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 9/9 tests pass. Frontend: All core functionality working. Fixed 1 bug in staff info window display.

ui_bugs.component: Staff Info Window on Main Map
ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Staff triangle marker click showed 'No bus assigned' even when bus was assigned. Fixed by mapping bus_number to am_bus_number/pm_bus_number in onClick handler.

critical_code_review_comments: Staff Zone Lookup feature is fully functional
Brian Stein test case verified: 4288 New York Avenue, Island Park, NY - shows nearby Bus #15 and Bus #31
Staff triangles appear on main map for assigned staff (cyan/teal colored)
Add staff manually with geocoding works correctly
Bus assignment via dropdown works correctly
Delete staff functionality works via API (tested in pytest)
Staff count shows in sidebar button as '(assigned/total)' format
Cover sheet includes staff in notes column
seed_data_creation: Brian Stein (4288 New York Avenue, Island Park, NY) already exists as test staff member assigned to Bus #15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Zone Lookup feature is complete and working. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_staff_zone_lookup.py cover all CRUD operations. Brian Stein is the test staff member assigned to Bus #15 with nearby buses Bus #15 and Bus #31. Staff triangles appear on main map. Fixed bug where staff info window showed 'No bus assigned' - now correctly shows bus assignment.

features_tested.backend_get_all_staff: PASS - GET /api/staff-addresses returns list of staff with geocoded locations
features_tested.backend_brian_stein_test_case: PASS - Brian Stein exists with correct address, Bus #15 assigned, nearby buses Bus #15 and Bus #31
features_tested.backend_create_staff: PASS - POST /api/staff-addresses creates staff with geocoding and nearby bus calculation
features_tested.backend_create_staff_with_bus: PASS - POST /api/staff-addresses with bus_number assigns bus correctly
features_tested.backend_geocoding_error: PASS - Invalid address returns 400 with geocoding error
features_tested.backend_cover_sheet: PASS - GET /api/sheets/seat-availability includes staff in notes column
features_tested.frontend_staff_zone_lookup_button: PASS - Button shows '(1/1)' indicating 1 assigned out of 1 total
features_tested.frontend_popup_opens: PASS - Staff Zone Lookup popup opens from sidebar button
features_tested.frontend_brian_stein_display: PASS - Brian Stein shows with address, Bus #15 assigned, nearby buses
features_tested.frontend_add_staff_form: PASS - Add Staff button shows form with name and address inputs
features_tested.frontend_add_staff_geocoding: PASS - Adding staff geocodes address and shows in list
features_tested.frontend_staff_triangle_marker: PASS - Staff triangles appear on main map for assigned staff
features_tested.frontend_staff_info_window: PASS - Clicking staff triangle shows info window with bus assignment (FIXED)
features_tested.frontend_bus_dropdown: PASS - Bus assignment dropdown works in staff cards
